sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22741" key="gramma/rion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γραμμάριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n22741.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">weight of two obols</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:117" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.117</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
